name: The Locavore Variety Store
description: Tucked away in the West Village, The Locavore Variety Store is a whimsical stop for curious collectors, offering playful gifts, stationery, home goods, and delightful little surprises around every corner.

name: Loaf on Paper
description: A cozy corner for paper lovers, Loaf on Paper offers a carefully curated collection of stationery, stickers, journals, and whimsical finds that are sure to spark creativity.

name: Haricot Vert's Dreamworld
description: Part charm bar, part craft haven, and part café, this dreamy Williamsburg gem is filled with whimsical treasures and creative experiences that spark joy.

name: November 19 Shop
description: A cozy little wonderland where handcrafted ceramics, playful trinkets, and unique finds from around the world come together in the most enchanting way.

name: Newtown HQ
description: Tucked away in Astoria, Newtown HQ is a cheerful wonderland brimming with adorable trinkets, stationery, and treasures from local, Mexican, and Japanese artists.

name: Lockwood Paper
description: A cozy neighborhood gem filled with charming gifts, whimsical stationery, and thoughtfully curated treasures that make every visit feel like a delightful little adventure.
